$comment: v0.3 — host notifications. Both channels disabled by default. Set enabled=true and fill in transport-specific fields. Secrets (SMTP_PASSWORD, SMS_AUTH_TOKEN) come from env, never from this file. Edit and restart the container to apply.

email.$comment: events[] filters which transitions trigger an email. Options: 'signed_in' (visitor arrived; host gets pinged), 'signed_out' (visitor signed themselves out), 'force_signed_out' (admin or security force-signed-out). Default ships only signed_in.

sms.$comment: Twilio adapter uses a direct REST call — no SDK required. Add a new adapter and dispatch on cfg.adapter to plug another provider. The 'log' adapter just logs without sending.
